transcript.text:
Dak Galbi (Spicy Stir-fried Chicken) or Sujebi (Hand-torn Noodle Soup)?
[Eat both!]
[A combination of Dak Galbi and Sujebi]
Wrap it with sujebi
[Sujebi-wrapped Dak Galbi?]
[That's good?!]
It's good!
[2 unlike dishes meet together]
[In here]
[All of it]
[And fried rice?!]
[My Lord...]
[This is a must-have]
[She does it all...]
[Where is our mukbang located today?]
Hello everyone

I'm at Haengdang Market today
I couldn't decide if I wanted Dak Galbi (Spicy Stir-fried Chicken) or Sujebi (Hand-torn Noodle Soup)
And found a place that serves both
[Sujebi Mukneun Dak Galbi] [Seoul, Seongdong-gu]
They have cold soybean noodles too
I will eat dak galbi and sujebi today
Hello
This place feels like a restaurant from way back
A lot of items on the menu
[Today's menu]
The dough is torn by hand here
10 servings of dak galbi
-How many servings? -10
Only a little bit of veggies
Not sure if it will fit
[I'm not finished]

Sweet potatoes and rice cake add-ons,
1 order of the Sujebi as well, please
[If you say so...]
[Here's the Dak Galbi]
[A huge pot]
How will you eat it all?
This is a lot
[Piece of cake]
It's considered a diet-food
Categorized as an alkaline food
It won't get you fat
I won't be gaining any weight today
The smell I love it
It smells delicious
Did you run the restaurant yourself for 30 years?
Indeed, It's time for me to leave

The record here was 4~5 servings
-1 person ate 4~5 servings from here? -Yes
I will be breaking that record today
Who's going to eat all of that?
10 servings?
I can eat it all
[Is he a big eater...?]
[They are having 3 servings]
Looks so good
[Some soup first]
That's tasty
It's so good
It tastes very organic
Sir... haha
It's really okay
[Super effective]

No more smoke
You're sweating Face it towards you instead
[It's okay]
[Don't forget about the Sujebi now...]
[Hand-torn noodles!]
[Fresh kimchi (non-aged)]
Thank you
It's sujebi!
It's been so long since I had this
That's a lot!
Is this really 1 serving?
Looks tasty
So good
These are hand-torn noodles
If it's too thin, it's not as good And if it's too thick, it gives too much flour-flavor
The thickness is just about right

The soup is also very savory
My cravings are satisfied now
[Dak Galbi is ready to be eaten!]
The chicken is very tender and tasty
This should be good with the soup
It's hot
There's soup here and it tastes good with it
[Sujebi and Dak Galbi together]
That's good!
It tastes better with soju!
[I'll have that next time!]
This is no joke
Eat it together
You can taste both of them in their own way
I'll turn the fire off since I like the soup
It's already good as it is

The sujebi is amazing
[Sujebi and Dak Galbi combo]
1 kimchi on top
Radish kimchi too
I've been craving these 2 dishes
They really go well together though
This is no joke
Rice cake, my favorite
Rice cake
So good
I think they deliver too
Let me see
They don't...
[Let's eat a lot today then]
[What is that?]
[All going in here]

You've already had like 5 servings
[So shocking]
It's so good
-Ginger, right? -Yes
Black peppers
And curry
I can't really eat ginger, but it's good
I bite into it here and there And it's good
This calls for some rice
I insist on making some fried rice today
It's a must
Sujebi alone is delicious
[Perilla leaf]
I wish they also had potato add-ons
It would be so good
If I break it up in here with the sauce

The chicken needs to be tender
That means you have to dine-in
[1 serving gone in 3 bites...]
I become a messy eater when I eat good food
There's endless sujebi in here
[Is this a magic jar?]
My grandmother used to always make me sujebi because I loved it so much
She made it in a pot this big
And I finished it all in 1 day
This tastes very similar to it
Dak Galbi wrapped with Sujebi is delicious
Potato
On top of the chicken
Put some sujebi in here
Not much left
Mix it up

Sujebi Dak Galbi
[Will it be okay...?]
This is it!
This is it
Folded perilla leaf
[Just eat it]
Not much left
Did you eat 10 servings?
Almost finished
[My Lord...]
[We're struggling with 3 servings over here]
That's a lot of food
[Wow]
It's because the food is tasty She can't do it if it tastes bad
You're right
[Only a little bit left]

Excuse me, Can I get fried rice, please?
[Fried rice over here]
[Hasty]
[Let's get started]
[We've all been waiting for this part...]
[A must-have after a meal: Fried Rice]
Bon appetit
With chicken
[Make sure to cool it down first!]
Let's scoop some out because it's hot
[Fried rice and chicken]
[Not saying a word...]
[Gone]
This is 1 bowl
A big bowl
[A big bite too...]

It all disappeared
Was I too focused? I feel dizzy
I feel like I zoned out for a bit and snapped back
Last bite!
That was a great meal
The best!
You finished it?
Faster than us
[We lost]
[Applause]
Thanks everyone [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
